metadata.description: Phase 3 permit/development activity ingestion pilot sources for Cabarrus FutureScape.
notes: The CFS data registry identified Permit Activity as ready for staging, but no approved staging or production endpoint was configured.
This pilot uses the public Cabarrus County OpenData Permits 2015 layer to validate ingestion, profiling, time fields, parcel/PIN join fields, and geometry handling.
A future authoritative permitting service URL must be reviewed before production/API use.

sources.name: Cabarrus County Permits 2015
notes: Historical 2015 permit polygons, suitable for local ingestion and schema profiling only.
Layer is not treated as the authoritative current permit feed.
PIN14 is the expected parcel join candidate.

required_future_source.name: Authoritative Permit Activity Service
security_notes: Use an approved staging endpoint before production rollout.
Do not place private credentials or tokenized production URLs in this config.
Future API access should use a read-only database role and server-side token strategy.
